quota.pooledExplanation: Monthly licensed verification usage is account-pooled across API keys within the billing month—the same pooling policy described under Quota semantics in docs/commercial.md.

frameworkFootnoteSuffix: Any framework able to emit structured tool activity can integrate.

verificationPaths.quickSqlOnlyDisclaimer: Quick verification (`agentskeptic quick`) is SQL inference only — full registry contract verification adds vectors, object storage (S3-compatible), HTTP witnesses, Mongo, and relational checks per docs/verification-state-stores.md.

integrateRequirements: Read-only access to at least one queryable store (full contract/registry verification supports SQL, vectors, S3-compatible object storage, HTTP witnesses, Mongo, and SQLite or remote SQL)
Ability to emit or export structured tool activity as NDJSON

commercialEntryPoints.homeCommercialLeadMarkdown: Open-source CLI is unmetered locally. Published npm installs use the commercial build — API key and successful POST /api/v1/usage/reserve apply for licensed CLI runs as described in docs/commercial.md. In-process createDecisionGate stays local and does not call the usage API.

pricing.pricingHeroSubtitleTemplate: Local and open-source (OSS) paths are unmetered. The published npm CLI with a Starter account includes up to {{starterIncluded}} licensed verifications per month, account-pooled across API keys within the billing month (hard cap; no overage). Paid self-serve plans add more included usage and metered overage beyond included when subscribed.
pricing.pricingHeroSubtitleSecondary: Paid self-serve plans also unlock enforce and lock-failure paths. Enterprise is contract.
pricing.paidVerificationTemplate: Starter includes {{starterIncluded}} published npm CLI verifications per month (hard cap, no overage; account-pooled usage). Individual, Team, and Business include higher monthly amounts plus pay-as-you-go overage; an active subscription is required (trial counts).
pricing.enforcementMarkdown: CI locks, the enforce command, and quick verify with lock flags require a paid plan (not Starter) and the same active subscription and metering model.
pricing.contractsMarkdown: Limits and semantics: OpenAPI at /openapi-commercial-v1.yaml, plans JSON at /api/v1/commercial/plans, and entitlement docs on GitHub main.
pricing.localVerificationFootnote: Local OSS verification remains free forever.

comparisonRows.featureDisplay: Published npm CLI + API key (licensed / metered)
Included verified runs (UTC month; pooled per account)

accountQuotaUrgency.ok: Usage is comfortably below your included verifications (account pooled) for this billing month.
accountQuotaUrgency.notice: You have used at least 75% of your included verifications (account pooled) for this billing month.
accountQuotaUrgency.warning: You have used at least 90% of your included verifications, or you are near the top of included before overage billing.
accountQuotaUrgency.in_overage: Verified runs have exceeded included amount — metered overage applied per plan where enabled; check the Stripe estimate above.
accountQuotaUrgency.at_cap: You have reached the hard cap (Starter where applicable) or a limit that blocks new runs. Upgrade or wait for the next month.
accountQuotaUrgency.zero_usage: No verification usage recorded for this billing month yet.

securityQuickFactsBullets: CLI and verification engine run in your infrastructure against databases you configure; the homepage demo runs bundled fixtures on this server for evaluation only.
Structured tool activity is compared to database query results at verification time; that check does not prove a specific network call caused a row.

Quick verify is a preview path; contract verification with an Outcome Certificate is what the engine treats as decision-grade for matches — see docs/outcome-certificate-normative.md on GitHub for highStakesReliance rules.

For buyer trust summaries on this site, use the guides and Problems index linked here first; authoritative field semantics remain in docs/outcome-certificate-normative.md on GitHub (not verification-product.md, which is a legacy redirect).

commercialEntry: **Commercial metering (published npm)** uses `AGENTSKEPTIC_API_KEY` + `POST /api/v1/usage/reserve` as documented in docs/commercial.md — account-pooled quota per billing month.

**OSS/unmetered CLI** for single-run verification: clone this repo and use the OSS build (`WF_BUILD_PROFILE=oss` / default `npm run build` artifact). State over-time `enforce` needs the commercial CLI and a paid entitlement.

homepageCopy.valueProposition: AgentSkeptic compares agent claims with real downstream state — databases, APIs, object stores, and vector stores — and returns a clear verdict. Read-only, deterministic, and CI-friendly.
homepageCopy.mechanismWorksWith: Postgres, SQLite, MongoDB, S3, HTTP APIs, vector stores, and other queryable systems — full registry contract verification covers witness kinds documented in verification-state-stores.md; quick mode stays SQL-focused.
